title: If Lilith was born from the Black Moon why is Rei always shown with the White Moon
display_title: If Lilith was born from the Black Moon why is Rei always shown with the White Moon
wikitext:
[]: If Lilith was born from the Black Moon, why is Rei always shown with the White Moon?             Quote Post by Lucky_Hamburger » Fri Jan 25, 2019 11:36 am In NGE, the moon is usually seen with Rei. However, this does not make sense. According to the wiki, Lilith was born from the Black Moon, while Adam was from the White Moon. Because of this, shouldn't we see Kaworu with the White Moon and Rei with the Black Moon?

[]: Re: If Lilith was born from the Black Moon, why is Rei always shown with the White Moon?             Quote Post by pwhodges » Fri Jan 25, 2019 12:23 pm Neither the Black Moon nor the White Moon is the Moon in the sky which is associated with Rei. https://wiki.evageeks.org/White_Moon https://wiki.evageeks.org/Black_Moon

[]: Re: If Lilith was born from the Black Moon, why is Rei always shown with the White Moon?             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jan 25, 2019 12:29 pm Lilith wasn't "born" from the Black Moon; it's the vessel she used to get to Earth. Rei is associated with Earth's Moon, as in the satellite, because of First Impact. The Black Moon collided with Earth, and debris from the Black Moon's rocky outer shell and the Earth was ejected into orbit, where it eventually coalesced into Luna.

[]: Re: If Lilith was born from the Black Moon, why is Rei always shown with the White Moon?             Quote Post by SawItAtAge10 » Sat Jan 26, 2019 5:36 pm Reichu wrote: Rei is associated with Earth's Moon, as in the satellite, because of First Impact.
